title: New '5-toubun no Hanayome' TV Anime, OVA Announced
content: The 5-toubun no Hanayome Special Event 2026 in Toyota Arena Tokyo announced a new television anime and new original video anime for the franchise on Saturday, revealing a project visual and an announcement promo.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Kakao Entertainment to Launch Webtoon Adaptation of Suji Kim's The Forgotten Meadows Web Novel
content: Kakao Entertainment announced on April 29 it will release a webtoon adaptation of The Forgotten Meadows , a new web novel by Suji Kim, on May 5 via Kakao Page and Kakao Webtoon.
author: ANN

title: Honō no Tōkyūjo: Dodge Danko Dodgeball Anime Unveils i☆Ris Ending Song, Another Cast Member
content: The staff for the television anime of Tetsuhiro Koshita 's Honō no Tōkyūjo: Dodge Danko manga announced information on the anime's ending theme song and another cast member on Saturday.
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia Manga Short Gets Anime Short This Summer
content: A manga short story that My Hero Academia creator Kōhei Horikoshi drew for the My Hero Academia Ultra Age fan book is inspiring a short anime. The anime short "I am a hero too" will debut this summer.
author: ANN

title: Korea's Largest Illegal Webtoon Site Newtoki Shuts Down Ahead of Crackdown
content: One of South Korea's largest illegal webtoon distribution sites, Newtoki, has abruptly shut down its services just weeks before the government rolls out a new rapid blocking system targeting copyright infringement.
author: ANN

title: The Quintessential Quintuplets Announces Two New Anime Projects, Including Sequel Novel Adaptation and OVA
content: A new anime project for The Quintessential Quintuplets has been officially announced, confirming two upcoming productions: an anime adaptation of the sequel novel The Quintessential Quintuplets: Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter and a new OVA episode.
author: Anime Corner

title: My Hero Academia Gets New Anime Focused on Eri, "More" Episode Reveals Opening
content: My Hero Academia announced a new short anime covering a special Eri-focused chapter from My Hero Academia: Ultra Age . The announcement came after My Hero Academia: More finished airing in Japan, and it also revealed the special opening used in the anime episode featuring “THE REVO” by PornoGraffitti.
author: Anime Corner

title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Game to Add Mr. Karate as DLC Character
content: SNK revealed on Saturday that it will add Mr. Karate to the Fatal Fury City of the Wolves fighting game in May. The character is part of the game's Season Pass 2. English announcement trailer Japanese announcement trailer Kim Jae Hoon, the first DLC character for Season Pass 2, launched on January 22.
author: ANN

title: Melty Blood:Twi-Lumina 2D Fighter Game Revealed for Release in Early 2027
content: Type-Moon announced on Saturday that it is developing the Melty Blood: Twi-Lumina 2D fighter game for release in early 2027 for the PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, Xbox One, and PC via Steam .
author: ANN

title: 3 Years Ago, Jujutsu Kaisen Featured Its Most Iconic Momemt Ever
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the Jujutsu Kaisen manga! Satoru Gojo plays a huge role in making Jujutsu Kaisen popular across the globe, especially after the anime debut. Fans loved the carefree sensei who is just as powerful as he is attractive.
author: ComicBook
